ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vaccine type */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "total_vaccinations" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccinations administered */,
  "people_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of people vaccinated */,
  "people_fully_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of people fully vaccinated */,
  "total_boosters" INTEGER /* Total number of booster shots administered */,
  "booster_first_dose" INTEGER /* Number of first doses administered as boosters */,
  "booster_second_dose" INTEGER /* Number of second doses administered as boosters */,
  "vaccination_site" TEXT /* Location of the vaccination site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_vaccine_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccine_id") REFERENCES vaccines ("vaccine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_source_url FOREIGN KEY ("source_url") REFERENCES data_sources ("url")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the location belongs to */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccines" (
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccine type */,
  "vaccine_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the vaccine */,
  "doses_required" INTEGER /* Number of doses required for the vaccine */,
  "booster_required" INTEGER /* Whether a booster dose is required for the vaccine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_organization FOREIGN KEY ("organization") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
